title: Itemless Item Frames
description: Removes the Sword from the Item Frame texture.
body: # Itemless Item Frames A very small and simple tweaks resource pack to remove the sword from the item frame item texture (glowing item frame too!). If it doesnt have a sword in it when placed down then why is it in the item texture!? (I think its actually intended game design to teach the first-time player that they can place items in them) ## ##
